title: Who said God doesnt exist in NGEverse
display_title: Who said God doesnt exist in NGEverse
wikitext:
[]: Who said God doesn't exist in NGEverse?             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Oct 11, 2009 2:47 pm I've finally uncovered visual proof that indeed, Shinji is religious man and God exists in world of evangelion. This is no longer matter of debate [URL=http://img2.imageshack.us/my.php?image=shinjiworshipingthebeer.png] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Oct 11, 2009 2:54 pm I spot a non sequitur there That's merely a gilded idol he's praying to.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Oct 11, 2009 2:55 pm Am I the only one who thinks Shinji looks like he is wearing lip stick in that frame?

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Sun Oct 11, 2009 2:55 pm Malt Beer makes Shinji religious? I guess Misato is a fucking religious nutjob.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Oct 11, 2009 2:58 pm Mr. Tines wrote: I spot a non sequitur there That's merely a gilded idol he's praying to.

[]:             Quote Post by Oz » Sun Oct 11, 2009 2:59 pm

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Sun Oct 11, 2009 3:03 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Oct 11, 2009 3:42 pm 'Beer is proof God loves us and wants us to be happy'?

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Oct 11, 2009 4:09 pm INDEED!

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Sun Oct 11, 2009 5:42 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Am I the only one who thinks Shinji looks like he is wearing lip stick in that frame?

[]:             Quote Post by Fredrick2003 » Sun Oct 11, 2009 6:40 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Am I the only one who thinks Shinji looks like he is wearing lip stick in that frame?

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Sun Oct 11, 2009 6:43 pm You people are so stupid. He's not worshipping the beer can, he's praying to the true God of NGE... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Oct 11, 2009 7:45 pm Holy Diver wrote: You people are so stupid. He's not worshipping the beer can, he's praying to the true God of NGE... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun Oct 11, 2009 8:54 pm He's praying to the beer gods Misato gets drunk enough to molest him again. sheesh this is year one stuff people.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun Oct 11, 2009 9:11 pm DatDude wrote: He's praying to the beer gods Misato gets drunk enough to molest him again. sheesh this is year one stuff people.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Oct 12, 2009 6:26 am Alaska Slim wrote: DatDude wrote: He's praying to the beer gods Misato gets drunk enough to molest him again. sheesh this is year one stuff people.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Mon Oct 12, 2009 11:30 am Alaska Slim wrote: BLASPHEMY! He's praying she gets drunk enough to molest Pen Pen and he gets to watch again. He's an observer, not a partaker, this is episode 2 stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon Oct 12, 2009 12:12 pm I believe God is there but not in a physical way other then 01 in EoE I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Mon Oct 12, 2009 12:46 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: I believe God is there but not in a physical way other then 01 in EoE I guess.

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Mon Oct 12, 2009 1:57 pm Sharaz Destler wrote: Does Pen-Pen do something like the bird in [url]http://news.bbc.co.uk/2/hi/8281382.stm[/url] this video beforehand?
summary:
[]: Who said God doesn't exist in NGEverse?             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Oct 11, 2009 2:47 pm I've finally uncovered visual proof that indeed, Shinji is religious man and God exists in world of evangelion. This is no longer matter of debate [URL=http://img2.imageshack.us/my.php?image=shinjiworshipingthebeer.png] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Oct 11,
